trigger: continuum_gate has below-threshold support in one or more method-dataset contexts
recommended_action: Report trajectory/continuum claims only with pseudotime or lineage-state diagnostics.

trigger: donor_aware_gate has below-threshold support in one or more method-dataset contexts
recommended_action: Check donor entropy together with biological-label conservation; donor mixing alone is not sufficient.
